headline: Jim Cramer: Buy This Industrial Stock, EquipmentShare Is ‘Disappointing’
summary: Mad Money: Jim Cramer disappointed in EquipmentShare, bullish on Kratos, Cheniere Energy and Pool Corp. Super Micro Computer receives a neutral rating.

headline: Phoenix Education Partners, Pentair And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Wednesday’s Pre-Market Session
summary: US stock futures mostly higher, Nasdaq up by 100 points. Phoenix Education falls after cutting sales guidance. Other stocks also down in pre-market.
